VDDX - VSS.conditions: Including VDD, VDDLDO, VDDSMPS, VDDA, VDD33USB, VBAT

Σ IVDD.parameter: Total current into sum of all VDD power lines (source)

Σ IVSS.parameter: Total current out of sum of all VSS ground lines (sink)

VDDLDO.parameter: Supply voltage for the internal regulator

VDDSMPS.parameter: Supply voltage for the internal SMPS Step-down converter

VIL.parameter: I/O input low level voltage except BOOT0

VIH.parameter: I/O input high level voltage except BOOT0
